reason: Finalizer requires all 906 shard outputs and metadata to be complete, but submitted Slurm arrays 1706840-1706845 were still active/pending.
parent_output_note: The Slurm job scripts write completed shard files as *.tmp.<array>_<task>.gz. Before running the finalizer, completed temp gzip files should be normalized to each metadata output_tsv_gz path after all corresponding jobs have exited.
pending_summary_requirement: After finalizer assembly, keep raw assembled all-hit outputs and all_interchromosomal_targets.tsv intact, but reduce per_window_target_similarity_support.tsv and full_genome_target_pattern_tracks.tsv to one deterministic best record per 2 kb target window.
